description: Bugfix cycle 2 for Milestone 4 — Board Core. Fixes 5 defects (missing frontend unit tests) found in QA review cycle 1.

userStories.title: Fix: Missing FreeTextNode render test (T-3.1.03) and click-to-edit test (T-3.2.04)
userStories.description: Fix defects DEF-001 and DEF-002 from QA report qa-m4-board-core.md. Create FreeTextNode unit tests.
acceptanceCriteria: Test T-3.1.03: FreeTextNode renders with transparent bg, no border, body text visible
Test T-3.2.04: Click on FreeTextNode enters edit mode showing textarea (data-testid='free-text-textarea')
Test verifies display mode (data-testid='free-text-display') before click
userStories.notes: Defect: DEF-001, DEF-002. File to create: frontend/src/__tests__/free-text-node.test.tsx. Component: frontend/src/components/board/FreeTextNode.tsx. The component has data-testid='free-text-node' on container, data-testid='free-text-textarea' in editing mode, data-testid='free-text-display' in display mode. Mock pattern: vi.mock('@xyflow/react', () => ({ Handle: ({ type, position, ...props }) => <div data-testid={`handle-${type}`} data-position={position} {...props} />, Position: { Top: 'top', Bottom: 'bottom', Left: 'left', Right: 'right' } })). Import i18n from '@/i18n/config' and run i18n.changeLanguage('en') in beforeAll. Use same renderHelper pattern as box-node.test.tsx. Describe blocks: 'T-3.1.03: FreeTextNode renders without border' and 'T-3.2.04: Click opens content editor'. For T-3.1.03: render with body='Some text', verify free-text-node has bg-transparent class, verify no 'border' class (use .not.toContain), verify body text visible. For T-3.2.04: render with body, click on free-text-node, verify free-text-textarea appears via fireEvent.click, verify free-text-display visible before click.

userStories.title: Fix: Missing ConnectionEdge render test (T-3.2.05) and label editor test (T-3.2.06)
userStories.description: Fix defects DEF-003 and DEF-004 from QA report qa-m4-board-core.md. Create ConnectionEdge unit tests.
acceptanceCriteria: Test T-3.2.05: ConnectionEdge renders BaseEdge with stroke gray and strokeWidth 1.5
Test T-3.2.06: Double-click on edge label opens input editor
userStories.notes:
Defect: DEF-003, DEF-004. File to create: frontend/src/__tests__/connection-edge.test.tsx. Component: frontend/src/components/board/ConnectionEdge.tsx. The component uses BaseEdge, getSmoothStepPath, EdgeLabelRenderer from @xyflow/react. Mock pattern: vi.mock('@xyflow/react', () => ({ BaseEdge: ({ id, path, style, ...props }) =>
, getSmoothStepPath: () => ['M0,0 L100,100', 50, 50], EdgeLabelRenderer: ({ children }) =>
{children}
, Position: { Top: 'top', Bottom: 'bottom', Left: 'left', Right: 'right' } })). Import i18n, beforeAll changeLanguage('en'). For T-3.2.05: render ConnectionEdge with id='test-edge', sourceX=0, sourceY=0, targetX=100, targetY=100, sourcePosition=Position.Bottom, targetPosition=Position.Top, selected=false, data={label:'test'}. Verify base-edge-test-edge has data-stroke='gray' and data-stroke-width='1.5'. For T-3.2.06: render with data={label:'Hello'}, find edge-label-test-edge, fireEvent.doubleClick on it, verify input element appears. Also verify Enter key commits edit (input disappears). Edge data-testid is `edge-label-${id}`.

userStories.title: Fix: Missing BoardToolbar button actions test (T-3.3.03)
userStories.description: Fix defect DEF-005 from QA report qa-m4-board-core.md. Create BoardToolbar unit tests.
acceptanceCriteria: Test T-3.3.03: Click Add Box calls onAddBox callback
Test T-3.3.03: Click Fit View invokes fitView from useReactFlow
Test T-3.3.03: Delete button disabled when selectedCount=0, enabled when selectedCount=1
userStories.notes: Defect: DEF-005. File to create: frontend/src/__tests__/board-toolbar.test.tsx. Component: frontend/src/components/board/BoardToolbar.tsx. The component uses useReactFlow from @xyflow/react to get fitView and screenToFlowPosition. Props: { selectedCount: number, onAddBox: (pos) => void, onDeleteSelected: () => void }. data-testid values: toolbar-add-box, toolbar-delete, toolbar-fit-view. Mock pattern: const mockFitView = vi.fn(); const mockScreenToFlowPosition = vi.fn(() => ({ x: 0, y: 0 })); vi.mock('@xyflow/react', () => ({ useReactFlow: () => ({ fitView: mockFitView, screenToFlowPosition: mockScreenToFlowPosition }) })). Import i18n, beforeAll changeLanguage('en'). For T-3.3.03 describe block: (1) render with onAddBox=vi.fn(), click toolbar-add-box, verify onAddBox called. (2) render with onDeleteSelected=vi.fn() and selectedCount=0, verify toolbar-delete button has disabled attribute. (3) render with selectedCount=1, click toolbar-delete, verify onDeleteSelected called. (4) click toolbar-fit-view, verify mockFitView called.
